name: User Entity

name: User Controller

description: Business logic for authentication (register, login, JWT generation)

name: Security Configuration
description: Spring Security config with JWT filter chain

name: Exception Handling
description: Global exception handler and custom exceptions

name: Application Configuration
description: Application.yml files for dev and prod profiles
